name: Fish Fragrant Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplant into small cubes.
2. In a bowl, combine 4 tablespoons of soy sauce, 3 tablespoons of sugar, 3 tablespoons of white vinegar, and 1/4 cup of water.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon of dry sherry in a pan. Add red pepper flakes and stir until fragrant.
4. Add the ginger root and chopped white parts of the scallions to the pan. Stir briefly until the ginger becomes fragrant.
5. Add the cubed eggplant to the pan and cook for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally until the eggplant is thoroughly cooked.
6. Pour in the soy sauce mixture (from step 2) and cook over high heat until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 5 minutes.
7. In a separate bowl, mix 1 tablespoon of cornstarch with 2 tablespoons of dry sherry. Add the chopped green parts of the scallions and stir until thickened.
8. Serve the fish fragrant eggplant over rice.
per serving: 137 cal, .4g fat (2.5% cff) [DOESN'T INCLUDE RICE]
